options.name: --match-run-id

options.name: --crawl-archives
options.description:
Attempts to crawl every archive file encountered when
using File Collector.  May dramatically increase run
time of the scan.

options.description:
Download files from thin Cloud Folders (like
OneDrive) to check them.

options.name: --keys
options.description:
Gather information about the cryptographic keys on
the system.

options.name: --user
options.description: Enable the user and group account collector

options.name: --wifi
options.description: Enable the saved Wifi information collector

options.name: --gather-hashes
options.description:
Hashes every file when using the File Collector.  May
dramatically increase run time of the scan.

options.name: --gatherverboselogs
options.description:
Gather all levels in the Log collector. (Default:
Only gather Error and Warning when possible.)

options.name: --gatherwifipasswords
options.description: Gather passwords when gathering wifi networks.

options.name: --overwrite
options.description:
If the specified runid already exists delete all data
from that run before proceeding.

options.description:
comma separated list of paths to scan with
FileSystemCollector

options.description:

exists delete all data from that run before
proceeding.

options.description:
(Default: Timestamp) Identifies which run this
is. Monitor output can be combined with collect
output, but doesn't need to be compared.
